close_reason: All subtasks completed - BUCK renamed to rules.star
description:
Rename all BUCK files to rules.star to make buck2 less visible as an implementation detail.

## Rationale
- 'rules.star' clearly indicates Starlark syntax
- Doesn't signal 'this is a Buck project'
- Descriptive of contents (build rules)
- Aligns with .turnkey isolation dir hiding buck-out artifacts

## Scope
- ~33 BUCK files to rename to rules.star
- Nix adapters generating files (go, rust, python, javascript)
- buckconfig [buildfile] name = rules.star
- gobuckify config: buildfile_name = rules.star
- Documentation updates

## Prerequisites
- gobuckify patch for configurable buildfile name (done)
title: Rename BUCK files to rules.star across the codebase
